acceptedAnswer.text: PayWise AI is a personal finance app that helps users organize debts, repayment dates, payoff progress, and AI-guided repayment insights in one place.

mainEntity.name: Is PayWise AI a budget planner?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PayWise AI works as a simple budget planner focused on debt tracking, repayment planning, payoff progress, and personal financial habits.

mainEntity.name: Can PayWise AI track credit card debt?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PayWise AI can be used to track credit card balances, repayment dates, progress, and payoff planning.

mainEntity.name: Can PayWise AI track PayLater or installment debt?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PayWise AI can help organize PayLater balances, installment payments, repayment dates, and overall payoff progress.
Yes. PayWise AI can help users track personal loans, car loans, home loans, and other debt repayment plans.

mainEntity.name: What is the debt avalanche method?

acceptedAnswer.text: The debt avalanche method is a payoff strategy that prioritizes debts with higher interest rates first while maintaining required payments on other debts.

mainEntity.name: What is the debt snowball method?

acceptedAnswer.text: The debt snowball method is a payoff strategy that prioritizes smaller balances first, helping users build momentum as each debt is paid down.

mainEntity.name: Does PayWise AI give financial advice?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. PayWise AI is for personal organization and educational budgeting guidance. It is not a bank, lender, investment adviser, tax adviser, legal adviser, or licensed financial adviser.

mainEntity.name: Does PayWise AI require a login?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. PayWise AI is designed to work without requiring a login.
PayWise AI has a free plan that lets users track up to 5 debts. Premium plans unlock unlimited debt tracking and deeper payoff planning features.

mainEntity.name: What does PayWise AI Premium include?

acceptedAnswer.text: PayWise AI Premium includes unlimited debt tracking, payoff strategy comparison, debt-free date insights, and debt reports.

mainEntity.name: Does PayWise AI have a lifetime purchase option?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PayWise AI Lifetime Premium is available as a one-time purchase of $34.99.

mainEntity.name: Is PayWise AI available on the App Store?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PayWise AI Budget Planner is available for iPhone and iPad on the App Store.
